incident.why: Two passenger vehicles have clearly collided, resulting in visible front-end damage to both vehicles and smoke/steam emanating from one. They are in a collision position on a paved surface.
incident.actual_accident_verification_note: Both the unannotated image and video clip confirm a true accident. Image note: The image clearly shows two vehicles in a collision position with visible damage to both front ends. The silver car has a crumpled hood and visible smoke/fumes emanating from beneath the front of the vehicle, which are strong indicators of an actual crash. Video note: The video clearly shows a black minivan backing into a silver car. Upon impact, the silver car's front hood is visibly crumpled, and smoke/steam emanates from its front, indicating collision damage.

hazards.notes: Smoke/steam is emanating from the front of the silver sedan.

lane_impact.lane_impact_notes: Two vehicles are stopped in a collision position on a paved surface, blocking movement in that area. It is unclear if this is a highway or a parking lot/private road.

location_in_view.location_statement: Incident involving two vehicles on a paved surface, possibly a parking lot or low-speed road.

lane_blockage.evidence: Roadway type is unclear; appears to be a paved area or parking lot, not a clearly defined highway with lanes.

vehicle_count.evidence: Two vehicles, a dark minivan/wagon and a silver sedan, are involved in the collision.

vehicle_type.evidence: Both vehicles appear to be passenger cars (minivan/wagon and sedan).

hazards.evidence: Smoke/steam is clearly visible emanating from the front of the silver sedan.

vehicle_orientation.evidence: Both vehicles are upright but are angled relative to each other and the general direction of flow, indicating a collision.

damage_deformation.evidence: The front hood of the silver sedan is visibly crumpled. The front of the dark minivan/wagon also shows impact damage.

debris_extent.evidence: No significant debris field is visible on the paved surface.

image_verification.note: The image clearly shows two vehicles in a collision position with visible damage to both front ends. The silver car has a crumpled hood and visible smoke/fumes emanating from beneath the front of the vehicle, which are strong indicators of an actual crash.

video_verification.note: The video clearly shows a black minivan backing into a silver car. Upon impact, the silver car's front hood is visibly crumpled, and smoke/steam emanates from its front, indicating collision damage.
